auth.loginSubtitle: Access your ElectroCorp dashboard to manage devices, routines and energy consumption.
auth.registerSubtitle: Create your ElectroCorp account to start managing smart energy devices.
auth.signInError: Could not sign in. Check your email and password.
auth.invalidEmailProvider: Only Gmail, Outlook or Hotmail emails are allowed.
auth.passwordTooShort: The password must be at least 8 characters long.
auth.recoverPasswordSubtitle: Enter your email and we will send you recovery instructions.
auth.recoverPasswordError: Could not send the recovery email.
auth.deleteAccountConfirmationError: The confirmation text is not valid.

home.title: Control your energy with ElectroCorp
home.content: Monitor devices, automate routines and review energy consumption from a modern platform.
home.noPlanDescription: Select a plan to activate ElectroCorp benefits.
home.alertDescription: Review consumption alerts, automation notices and important system events.

about.title: About ElectroCorp
about.content: ElectroCorp is a smart platform for monitoring energy consumption, managing devices, configuring automatic routines and receiving alerts.

notFound.title: Page not found
notFound.content: The route you entered does not exist or was moved.

devices.title: Smart device control
devices.subtitle: Manage smart plugs, switches and lights from a centralized view.
devices.name: Name
devices.emptyContent: Add your first smart plug, switch or light to get started.
devices.planLimitReached: You have reached the device limit allowed by your plan.

routines.title: Automatic routines
routines.subtitle: Schedule actions to turn smart devices on or off based on defined times.
routines.name: Name
routines.emptyContent: Create a routine to automate your devices.
routines.conflictError: There is already an active routine for that device at the same time.
routines.planLimitReached: You have reached the routine limit allowed by your plan.

energy.title: Energy consumption monitoring
energy.subtitle: Visualize your device consumption, filter history and export readings for analysis.
energy.noDataRecommendation: There is not enough data yet to generate a recommendation.
energy.highRecommendation: Your energy consumption is high. Review your highest-consuming devices.
energy.moderateRecommendation: Your energy consumption is moderate. Review peak hours to improve savings.
energy.lowRecommendation: Your energy consumption remains low. Keep optimizing your routines.
energy.exportNotAllowed: Your current plan does not allow CSV report exports.

history.title: Consumption history
history.subtitle: Review registered readings, detect consumption peaks and export information for reports.

billing.title: Service plans
billing.subtitle: Choose the plan that best fits your home, business or multiple locations. There is no free plan; all plans are oriented to real operation.
billing.alreadySubscribed: You are already subscribed to this plan.
billing.invalidCardNumber: The card number is not valid.
billing.summaryStarterText: Ideal to start with basic monitoring and simple alerts.
billing.summaryProfessionalText: The best option for advanced homes and small businesses.
billing.summaryEnterpriseText: Built for teams, locations and business operations.

planUsage.PROFESSIONAL: For advanced homes and small businesses

planDescriptions.STARTER: Basic energy management for small homes.
planDescriptions.PROFESSIONAL: Advanced control for homes and small businesses.
planDescriptions.ENTERPRISE: Complete platform for multiple business locations.

billing.historySubtitle: Review your payments, invoices and current subscription status.
billing.emptyInvoicesContent: Your invoices will appear here after your payments are processed.
billing.invalidExpirationDate: The expiration date is not valid.
billing.paymentDescription: Register the payment to activate the selected plan.

alerts.title: System alerts
alerts.subtitle: View important events, consumption alerts and operational notifications from ElectroCorp.
alerts.emptyContent: When an important event occurs, it will appear in this section.
alerts.markAsReadError: Could not mark alert as read.
alerts.planLimitReached: You have reached the alert limit allowed by your plan.

profile.title: My profile
profile.subtitle: Manage your personal information and account settings.
profile.deleteAccountWarning: This action is permanent and cannot be undone.

profile.title: Personal data
profile.pageDescription: Manage the name and email saved in your ElectroCorp account.
profile.basicInfoDescription: This data is saved in your ElectroCorp account.
profile.dataUsageDescription: Quick reference for how name and email appear inside ElectroCorp.
profile.visibleNameDescription: Used to identify your account in the side panel and user views.
profile.accountEmailDescription: Used as the reference for access recovery and main profile data.
profile.statusDescription: Save the profile to sync data with the current session.

account.title: Account status
account.pageDescription: Review identity, role and general status for the authenticated user.
account.identityDescription: Compact summary of the authenticated user.
account.operationalReadingDescription: Elements that help understand account scope without mixing sensitive actions.
account.sessionDescription: This view is shown only for a user authenticated by the access guard.
account.editableDataDescription: Name and email are updated from Profile to keep this page as an account summary.
account.sensitiveActionsDescription: Recovery and account deletion live on a separate screen to reduce mistakes.

security.title: Access and recovery
security.pageDescription: Manage sensitive access actions with available real calls.
security.accessActionsDescription: Only actions with an available real call are shown.
security.sendRecoveryDescription: Use the real access recovery flow for the email saved in the profile.
security.deleteAccountDescription: Opens a strict confirmation before deleting the current account.
security.securityStatusDescription: Summary of active controls before executing sensitive actions.
security.recoveryEmailDescription: The recovery link is requested for the current email of the authenticated account.
security.writtenConfirmationDescription: Deletion remains blocked until the confirmation text matches exactly.
security.finalConfirmationDescription: The account is deleted only after accepting the danger confirmation dialog.
security.noRecoveryEmail: No email is registered for access recovery.
security.deleteDialogMessage: This action deletes your ElectroCorp account, closes your session and cannot be undone from the interface.
security.deleteDialogDetail: Before continuing, verify that you do not need access to data, invoices or preferences associated with this account.
security.requiredTextLabel: To confirm, type exactly this word:
security.requiredTextHint: The delete button will remain blocked until the confirmation matches exactly.

platform.title: Local preferences
platform.pageDescription: Adjust ElectroCorp appearance and language in this browser.
platform.browserExperienceDescription: Applied in this browser and kept locally.
platform.darkModeDescription: Change the interface appearance in this browser.
platform.preferencesSummaryDescription: Confirm how the experience is configured in this browser.
platform.appearanceDescription: The visual preference applies to the shell and shared interface components.
platform.activeLanguageDescription: The selected language is kept locally to maintain consistent navigation.
platform.scopeDescription: These settings live in the current browser and are ready to sync with user preferences.

billing.title: Plan and payments
billing.pageDescription: Manage your active subscription, review registered payments and download invoices issued for your account.
billing.planStatusDescription: Real information for the active plan, operational limits and payment activity.
billing.choosePlanDescription: Choose a plan to activate the full platform.
billing.registeredMovementsDescription: Payments received from the real subscription flow.
billing.noPaymentsDescription: Payments will appear when you activate or renew a plan.
billing.issuedDocumentsDescription: Download only invoices that exist in your account.
billing.noInvoicesDescription: When an invoice is issued for your account, it will appear here.
billing.cancelPlanMessage: Your active subscription will be canceled. Confirm only if you no longer want to continue with the plan.
